provider_offers.note: legacy table — active ingest writes to provider_offer_current

pick_candidates.measurement_note: created_at is frozen at original INSERT under upsert-on-conflict pattern (UTV2-1229). updated_at is the correct activity signal.

pick_candidate_upsert_behavior.created_at_behavior: frozen at original INSERT — never updated on conflict
